signals.reasoning: This is a protect-the-position call. The BLUR long is down to only about $0.05 unrealized after peaking near $0.30, retaining just 17% of peak P&L, and the request flags it urgent. Even with a still-bullish mechanical board, the trade has already failed to hold gains. I would close it now.

This one is even clearer. The TNSR long has gone from a positive peak near $0.81 to a live unrealized loss around $-0.86, with the request explicitly warning that peak retention is effectively zero. The squeeze thesis may still exist structurally, but this instance of the trade is broken and should be cut immediately.
BTC is stable, but the board still marks it no-trade and funding is mildly positive. There is not enough edge here to justify fresh exposure after exiting damaged longs.
ETH remains directionless and slightly soft, but not with enough conviction for a clean short. Positive funding and a no-trade board read keep this in neutral territory.
SOL has mild upside on price, but funding is positive and the board remains no-trade. It is not a clean enough continuation long to deserve capital here.
GRASS has some upside momentum, but the board is still neutral and spread quality is mediocre. It is not one of the best opportunities on this sheet.
MON no longer has the same clean bearish asymmetry as earlier boards. Funding is only mildly positive and the board now reads neutral, so it falls below trade threshold.
ZEC is liquid and relatively orderly, but the signal is low-energy and the board is no-trade. It is stable rather than compelling.
CHILLGUY is ripping, but the spread is poor and funding is positive, which makes this a bad chase under a RED macro regime. Too unstable for fresh entry.

FARTCOIN still has the clearest bearish setup among the non-position names: negative 24h trend, positive funding, and strong real volume. It is volatile, so conviction stays moderate, but it remains the cleaner short candidate.
CFX has some positive price action, but the board is still neutral and liquidity is not attractive enough to make it a priority long. Watchlist only.
